---
title: Templates overview
description: Dovetell templates are reusable Markdown assets packaged from reviewed source material.
---

Dovetell templates are reusable Markdown assets packaged from reviewed source
material.

They may include:

- context folder templates
- session launchers
- prompt shapers
- decision and task schemas
- audit prompts
- review checklists
- setup guides

## Public vs paid

Public docs should explain the method and provide useful samples.

Paid templates should provide packaged, versioned, ready-to-use assets with
clear usage rights and support expectations.

## Source of truth

Template source should remain in the source assets repo until it is reviewed,
packaged, and released.

The public docs site can describe the template, link to free samples, and
provide documentation for licensed users without becoming the raw package
source.
